---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a product improvement or release workflow enhancement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the improvement you want.

## Problem

What workflow, user journey, or operator need is not well served today?

## Proposed Direction

Describe the shape of the solution you would like to see.

## Success Criteria

How should we know this feature is done and useful?

## Additional Context

Add mockups, examples, related issues, or constraints.
